creator: Panacea Palm | Dij 🙋🏽‍♂️
source_text:
High Protein Birthday Cake Fluff!🍦🎂😮‍💨💪🏽

27g Protein! ONLY 250 calories | Calorie Deficit Cheat Code!

Comment “Cookbook” and I’ll DM you a purchase link to my High Protein Cookbook with 300+ recipes just like this one! 📕👨🏽‍🍳 

Makes 1 HUGE tub

Calories & Macros 📊
Per bowl: 250 calories 
27g P | 39g C | 2g F

Ingredients
- 50ml skimmed milk
- 1 frozen banana 
- 1/2 tsp vanilla extract 
- 2 drops birthday cake extract (or just 1/2 tsp more vanilla)
- 30g vanilla whey protein (I use @proteinworks use code PANACEAPALM for a discount)
- 15ml of sugar free maple syrup
- 1 cup of ice
- 5g rainbow sprinkles 
- optional 10g sweetener 

Blend in a food processor on high do 5 minutes till no clumps remain and it’s tripled in volume!🔥

- Serve immediately while fluffy!
- This is a great dessert option when you’re in a deficit and will keep you full for ages!😮‍💨

Comment “Cookbook” and I’ll DM you a shop link to my High Protein Cookbook with 300+ recipes just like this one with calorie tracking barcodes! 📕👨🏽‍🍳 

🏷️ #highprotein #lowcaloriedessert 
 #highvolumedessert #fatloss #birthdaycakefluff
